title: PHCCI Best Community Organisation Finalist
description: We are honoured to be a PHCCI 2026 finalist for Excellence in Customer Service, a recognition of our dedication to putting people first and providing the care, attention, and support our customers deserve.

title: KDCCI Best Community Organisation Nominee
description: We were proud to be nominated for the Community Impact Award at the KDCCI Business Excellence Awards, recognising the work we do to strengthen connection, care, and inclusion across the Karratha community.
